{{Infobox character
| name = Doctor Janbell Cryce
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Janbell Cryce]] is an older [[Lichborn woman]] and the inventor of the [[Divine Titans]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Janbell is Parryl's aunt.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Janbell Cryce]] is a [[Lichborn woman]] with gray skin and glowing green eyes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
